property.name: java.library.path

otepad\Notepad++;D:\soft_1\Git\cmd;D:\soft_1
ode;D:\soft_1\python_11\Scripts;D:\soft_1\python_11;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\soft_1\jdk17 in;D:\soft_1\IDEA\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1 in;D:\soft_1\vscode\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: noUserMessageInHistory
testcase.system-out: 12:58:42.115 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 触发全量摘要: 当前 tokens=45 > budget=5, 消息数=5 12:58:42.129 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 全量摘要完成: 5 条消息 → 1 条, tokens 45→36, summaryLen=49

testcase.name: emptySummaryFallback
testcase.system-out: 12:58:42.141 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 触发全量摘要: 当前 tokens=300 > budget=10, 消息数=20 12:58:42.141 [main] WARN com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 摘要为空，保持原始消息不变

testcase.name: fallbackOnLLMFailure
testcase.system-out: 12:58:42.149 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 触发全量摘要: 当前 tokens=300 > budget=10, 消息数=20 12:58:42.150 [main] ERROR testcase.name: triggersWhenOverBudget
testcase.system-out: 12:58:42.170 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 触发全量摘要: 当前 tokens=320 > budget=10, 消息数=20 12:58:42.171 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L4FullSummaryFallback -- [L4] 全量摘要完成: 20 条消息 → 2 条, tokens 320→69, summaryLen=102
